title: cloudmoon
description: 比原版更好的冒险体验(A better adventure than the original)
body:
# 云月整合包[简体中文]
- 这是一个**探索**和**冒险**的整合包，可以当作**休闲**游玩。没有**任务**系统，游戏进度**自由**发挥，**探索**更多的遗迹和纬度，**挑战**更强的怪物和Boss
- 计划添加更多趣模组
- 优化性能
<details>
<summary>主要模组</summary>

- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)让末地焕然一新
- [amplified nether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amplified-nether)下界更加大
- [deeper and darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)古城的传送门似乎有点东西...
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)更多生物群系
- [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise)更多的地牢等你探索

</details>

## 游玩建议
1. 分配内存最低4G(4096MB)最佳内存8G(8192MB)或更多
2. 添加光影游玩
3. 记得佩戴耳机哦!
## 其他说明
1. 如果整合包有问题可以前往[Github](https://github.com/Ovear-Mitama/cloudmoom/issues)反馈
# cloudmoon modpacks[English]
- This is an integrated pack of Exploration and Adventure that can be played as Casual. There is no quest system, the game progression is free, more ruins and latitudes are explored, and stronger monsters and bosses are challenged
- More fun mods are planned
- Optimize performance
<details>
<summary>Main mods</summary>

- [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) Gives the end a new look
- [amplified nether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/amplified-nether) The lower bound is larger
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) The portal of the ancient city seems to have something...
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) More biomes
- [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise) More dungeons to explore

</details>

## Play Suggestions
1. Allocated memory: minimum 4G (4096MB) and optimal memory: 8G (8192MB) or more
2. Add light and shadow play
3. Remember to wear headphones!
## Other Notes
1. If there is a problem with the integration package, you can go to [Github](https://github.com/Ovear-Mitama/cloudmoom/issues) for feedback
